cues.text: 第十七課：別忘了把燈關了
cues.tr: Lesson 17: Don’t Forget to Turn Off the Lights

cues.text: 哎，小陳，你怎麼還在這裡？會議不是結束了嗎？
cues.tr: Hey, Xiao Chen, why are you still here? Didn’t the meeting end already?
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 對啊，會議剛結束，我正準備走，不過還有一些事沒做完。
cues.tr: Yeah, the meeting just ended. I was about to leave, but I still have a few things left to do.
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 哦，是什麼事？需不需要我幫忙？
cues.tr: Oh, what’s that? Do you need my help?
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 謝謝，不用了！我只是要把燈關了，然後再把文件借給小李。他剛好要用。
cues.tr: Thanks, but no need! I just need to turn off the lights and then lend a document to Xiao Li. He happens to need it.
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 啊，記得關燈！上次你忘了關，公司電費幾乎增加了一倍。
cues.tr: Ah, remember to turn off the lights! Last time you forgot, and the company’s electricity bill nearly doubled.
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 哈哈，對對對，我這個人就是常常丟三落四，真是個壞習慣。我一定不會再忘了！
cues.tr: Haha, yes, yes, yes, I’m someone who often forgets things—such a bad habit. I definitely won’t forget again!
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 這樣才對嘛！對了，今天開會的地方環境怎麼樣？
cues.tr: That’s the spirit! By the way, how was the environment at today’s meeting venue?
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 還不錯，燈光和設備都挺好，不過人多了點，差不多二十人左右。
cues.tr: Not bad. The lighting and equipment were pretty good, but there were quite a lot of people, about twenty or so.
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 那不少啊，環境會不會有點擠？
cues.tr: That’s quite a number! Was the place a bit crowded?
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 有一點，不過還可以。話說回來，小張說他一會兒會來拿你借的那本《商業管理》的書，你跟他借了對嗎？
cues.tr: A little, but it was manageable. Speaking of which, Xiao Zhang said he’d come by in a bit to get the book Business Management that you borrowed. You borrowed it from him, right?
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 嗯，我好像還給他了。不得不說，他借書的習慣真好，一向按時歸還。
cues.tr: Hmm, I think I already returned it to him. I have to say, he has a really good habit of borrowing books—always returning them on time.
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 是啊，我也習慣按時還書，這樣對大家都方便。
cues.tr: Yeah, I also make it a habit to return books on time—it’s convenient for everyone.
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 對對，我們都應該這樣。不過有時候事情多了就會忘記，所以提醒一下總是好的。
cues.tr: Exactly, we should all do that. But sometimes, when there’s too much going on, we forget things, so a little reminder is always helpful.
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 沒錯。我記得上個月我跟他借了一本書，結果忘了還他，真是不好意思。
cues.tr: True. I remember last month I borrowed a book from him and ended up forgetting to return it. It was so embarrassing.
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 哈哈，你還真的是貴人多忘事。對了，你今晚回家記得把門鎖好！
cues.tr: Haha, you really are forgetful! By the way, when you go home tonight, don’t forget to lock the door!
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 當然，放心吧。我一般九點左右就回家，不會太晚的。
cues.tr: Of course, don’t worry. I usually get home around nine o’clock, not too late.
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 好，那我們就一會兒見吧！記得關燈！
cues.tr: Alright, then I’ll see you in a bit! Remember to turn off the lights!
cues.speaker: A
